# Tooleap

A static archive of the Tooleap website — the marketing home page, the Developer Center,
and the SDK reference — preserved for historical reference.

Tooleap was an Android "always-on-top" floating-UI SDK.

## Structure

```
/                     home page
/developers/          Developer Center — guides, FAQ, knowledge base
/developers/javadoc/  SDK reference (Javadoc, v0.9.7)
/assets/  /images/    static assets (CSS, JS, fonts, images, video)
```

## Notice
